"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2017.3.4\bin\cmake\bin\cmake.exe" -E remove -f CMakeFiles\skynet.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw-w64\x86_64-7.2.0-posix-seh-rt_v5-rev1\mingw64\bin\ar.exe cr CMakeFiles\skynet.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\skynet.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw-w64\x86_64-7.2.0-posix-seh-rt_v5-rev1\mingw64\bin\gcc.exe -g   -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\skynet.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive  -o skynet.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libskynet.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\skynet.dir\linklibs.rsp
